name: Secret Skills of the Six Samurai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>六</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>衆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かげ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>術</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Shadow Ninjutsu of the Six Warmen
desc: Send 1 monster you control to the GY, then target 1 of your banished "Six Samurai" monsters; Special Summon it. You can only activate 1 "Secret Skills of the Six Samurai" per turn.
eff: Send 1 monster you control to the GY, then target 1 of your banished "Six Samurai" monsters; Special Summon it. You can only activate 1 "Secret Skills of the Six Samurai" per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
